discussion_posts.name: feketrob
discussion_posts.content: Same problem as [Minimum Falling Path Sum II](https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-falling-path-sum-ii/description/)

discussion_posts.name: sdk__
discussion_posts.content: Neat little problem. My thinking went from brute force (K^N time), to DP (NK^2), to DP with priority queue to fetch the 2 lowest costs (NK log K). Then I implemented my solution. It scored slower than I expected, and I realized I didn\'t need a priority queue at all if I added some ugly manual min-handling (NK time).
